ablation.cohort: primary QB per team-week (argmax projection_mean), matching the sim's starter pathway

status_reason: PROE volume node beats both baselines on team pass attempts in every test season and shrinks the QB attempts bias without hurting MAE; promote to a full-simulation ablation (role-shock harness) before shadow.
